description_long: This is a luxury wristwatch featuring a rose gold-toned metal case with a polished, angular bezel and a black analog dial. The dial is detailed with three subdials, slender metallic hour markers, and luminous hands, giving it a chronograph appearance. The watch strap is textured black leather with a crocodile pattern, and the inner side of the strap is a light tan color, likely suede or leather. The crown and two pushers are visible on the right side of the case, indicating chronograph functionality. The brand logo and name are displayed prominently below the 12 o'clock position on the dial. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A rose gold luxury chronograph wristwatch with a black crocodile-pattern leather strap and a detailed black dial featuring subdials and metallic markers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial with three subdials, rose gold case, and brand logo below 12 o'clock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the rose gold case, crown, and pushers, as well as the curvature of the black leather strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured black leather strap with adjustment holes and the clasp mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case's side and the inner tan lining of the leather strap.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, metallic emblem and the word 'ARSHOLEX' are visible below the 12 o'clock position on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with three subdials arranged in a chronograph layout, metallic hour markers, and luminous hands. The design is detailed and modern, with a polished finish and a clear, legible layout.
attribute_strap_type: Textured black leather strap with a crocodile pattern and a tan inner lining.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands and three subdials, featuring metallic markers and luminous elements.
